feed.title: Google Cloud: App Engine flexible environment custom runtimes
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: App Engine flexible environment custom runtimes

entry.content: Support for deploying your existing apps in the flexible environment to Cloud Run using the gcloud beta app migrate-to-run command is in Preview. For more information, see Deploy an App Engine app in the flexible environment to Cloud Run.
entry.summary: You can now migrate your existing App Engine flexible environment applications to Cloud Run using the `gcloud beta app migrate-to-run` command. This new feature is currently in Preview and offers a streamlined way to move your apps. For detailed instructions, refer to the official documentation on migrating App Engine flexible to Cloud Run.
entry.title: Feature: Migrate App Engine flexible to Cloud Run

entry.content: To increase security, starting in March 2025, support for Transport Layer Security (TLS) version 1.1 and earlier is deprecated. Update your application settings in the App Engine flexible environment to use TLS version 1.2 and later, along with a corresponding secure set of cipher suites (Preview).
entry.title: Feature: Security Update
